title: Google Search Redesign
subtitle: Optimizing India's web search for clarity and speed.
problem_statement: Current Google search interface, while familiar, presents subtle cognitive load and missed opportunities for India-specific user needs.

pillars.title: Cognitive Load
pillars.insight: Users process information quickly, but visual clutter slows them.

pillars.title: Information Hierarchy
pillars.insight: Users struggle to distinguish primary results from secondary content.

pillars.title: Efficiency
pillars.insight: Users seek immediate answers, any delay causes frustration.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we simplify search results presentation?
How might users find local content faster?
How might we integrate regional language support seamlessly?

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need quick, accurate information, no distractions.
personas.bio: Rohan uses Google daily for coding solutions, news, and local services. Values speed.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Finding local recipes and study materials is key.
personas.bio: Priya uses Google for academic research, local shopping, and family recipes. Prefers simplicity.

insights: Can I find this in Hindi?

points.action: Replace text ads with visual product cards.
Integrate local business listings directly into main results.
Tailor search snippets based on user's regional language preference.
Simplify search filters to be more prominent and intuitive.

pivot.before: Cluttered search results page with ambiguous ad placements.
pivot.pivot_logic: Users need clear distinction between ads and organic content, plus quick access to local context.
pivot.after: Clean, intuitive SERP with distinct ad labeling and prominent local filters.

annotations.title: Clear Ad Labels
annotations.rationale: Visually differentiate ads from organic results to reduce cognitive load.

annotations.title: Local Filters
annotations.rationale: Enable quick filtering for India-specific content, languages, and services.

annotations.title: Simplified Snippets
annotations.rationale: Reduce text density, highlight key information for faster scanning.

data.finding: Ad labels are subtle, causing user confusion.
Different result types lack visual consistency.
Misinterpreting ads as organic results is common.
SERP feels cluttered with diverse content blocks.
